title: Lore – Open source version control system designed for scalability
author: regnerba
aiHeadline: Lore: The open-source version control system that promises to solve all your scalability issues, but let's be honest, who even knows what scalability means anymore?

title: Sixty percent of US consumers say 'AI' in brand messaging is a turnoff
author: thm
aiHeadline: AI in brand messaging? Yeah, that's about as appealing as a pop-up ad in 2026. 60% of consumers are saying 'no thanks' to the robot takeover in their inbox.

title: GLM-5.2 is the new leading open weights model on Artificial Analysis
author: himata4113
aiHeadline: GLM-5.2: Because 5.1 wasn't good enough, now we have 5.2, the latest and greatest in open weights models. Because clearly, the world needs another model to solve problems it didn't even know it had.

title: U.S. science is in chaos
author: presspot
aiHeadline: U.S. science is in chaos, and honestly, who can blame them? When politics and research collide, it's like a game of Jenga with the future of humanity.

title: Want your images back? That'll be $5
author: lutr
aiHeadline: Want your images back? That'll be $5. Because your data is worth more than a cup of coffee, but apparently, not much more.
